message.content:
This is a mobile screenshot of the Benin education portal "EducMaster" (emp.educmaster.bj) displaying a data visualization dashboard with a map of Benin. Here's a detailed breakdown:

**Overall Layout & Color Scheme:**
- Dominant deep blue background (#1e3a8a or similar) with white text
- Clean, modern interface with clear information hierarchy
- Mobile-first design optimized for vertical scrolling

**Header Section:**
- Top status bar showing time (15:32), battery (35%), network indicators
- Chrome browser address bar with URL "emp.educmaster.bj"
- Browser navigation buttons (back, forward, refresh)
- Language toggle buttons "FR" and "EN" in the top-right
- Three-dot menu icon

**Main Content:**
1. **Welcome Section:**
   - Title "Bienvenue sur EducMaster" in large white text
   - Subtitle "Le Système d'Information de Gestion de l'Éducation du MEME" in smaller white text
   - Description text about education management system
   - Three key statistics displayed in white boxes:
     - "2291876 APPRENANTS" (learners)
     - "63299 ENSEIGNANTS" (teachers)
     - "17138 ÉCOLES" (schools)

2. **Map Visualization:**
   - Central map of Benin showing departments with varying blue shades
   - Lighter blue for lower values, darker blue for higher values
   - Department names visible: Borgou, Alibori, Atacora, Donga, Collines, Zou, Atlantique, Littoral
   - Map legend indicates "nombre d'écoles par département" (number of schools by department)

3. **Data Panel (Right Side):**
   - Title "La maternelle et le primaire en un coup d'œil" (Preschool and primary at a glance)
   - Filter tabs: "Tous", "Public", "Privé" (All, Public, Private)
   - Department details for Borgou (4/12):
     - "Écoles: 1704"
     - "Apprenants: 290109"
     - "Enseignants: 6299"
     - "% Filles: 50.3%"
     - Public/Private breakdown percentages
     - Sub-prefecture statistics (10 total) with numerical data

4. **Bottom Section:**
   - Three functional cards with white backgrounds:
     - "Suivre" (Monitor): Apprenants, classes, examens en temps réel
     - "Piloter" (Manage): Écoles, ressources humaines, planning
     - "Décider" (Decide): Indicateurs PTF (UNESCO, PME, BM)
   - Partner logos: BENIN (Budget National), PME (Partenaire Financier), UNICEF (Partenaire Technique)

**UI Elements:**
- Clean typography with sans-serif fonts
- Consistent blue-white color palette
- Interactive elements (tabs, buttons) with subtle hover/active states
- Responsive grid layout
- Information hierarchy through size and color variation
- Data visualization through choropleth map
- Statistical cards with clear labeling

The design effectively communicates educational statistics through a combination of map visualization and tabular data, targeting education administrators and policymakers in Benin.
